title: HEXA-WEAVE MVP W5 — Alt-2 follow-on (CD-HIT 30%-id clustering plan + python emulation)
task_label: cycle 10 / fan-out 4/5 W5 Alt-2 deepening: RCSB FASTA + difflib emulation + cluster split + CD-HIT plan
scope: Cycle 9 fan-out 3/5 retired F-W2-4 PARTIAL via RCSB Query B = 1965 entries. Cycle 10 fan-out 4/5 deepens dataset prep without GPU/torch/cd-hit-binary: (a) HTTPS-fetch first 100 protein FASTAs from Query B, (b) python-stdlib difflib.SequenceMatcher pairwise + 30%-id greedy clustering as CD-HIT pre-flight, (c) cluster-aware 80/10/10 split simulation, (d) accurate CD-HIT install + run procedure plan documented for user approval. raw 91 C3: difflib != BLAST/CD-HIT — emulation is architecture-validation pre-flight only.

difflib_pairwise_executed.method: python3 stdlib difflib.SequenceMatcher.ratio() on first-protein-chain truncated to 300 aa

clustering_30pct_id_executed.algorithm: CD-HIT-like greedy: sort by length desc; assign to first cluster whose representative has ratio >= 0.30

split_80_10_10_simulation.set_intersection_check: train ∩ val = ∅, train ∩ test = ∅, val ∩ test = ∅ (PASS)

cd_hit_accurate_plan.tool_stub_to_write: tool/hexa_weave_rcsb_fetch_all.py (~80 LoC stdlib + concurrent.futures, W7 deliverable)

deliverables.http_call_breakdown: 1 RCSB Search v2 query + 100 FASTA GETs
